mechanics.excerpt: December 2766. Stefan Amaris murdered Richard and took control of the Star League within weeks Inis coup d'etat; General Aleksandr Kerensky; commander the Star League Defense Force launched bitter, thirteen-year war t0 liberate the League from the usurper' grasp. On 29 September 2779_ Kerensky led the assault against Amaris last stronghold on Terra; the face of overwhelming torce _ Amaris surrendered Kerensky ordered SLDF troops t0 summarily execute him , his family and his clos- est aides tor their crimes against numanity.
